steps: Go to https://app.hubspot.com and log in (you must be a Super Admin)
Click the settings gear icon in the top navigation bar
In the left sidebar, navigate to Integrations → Private Apps
Enter a name and description for your app
Under the 'Scopes' tab, select the CRM scopes you need (e.g., crm.objects.contacts.read, crm.objects.deals.read)
Click 'Create app' and then confirm in the dialog
Copy the access token shown — this is your API key

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Private App Access Token
credential_fields.description: The access token generated by your HubSpot private app, used as a Bearer token

notes: Legacy HubSpot API Keys (hapikey) were deprecated in November 2022 — use Private App access tokens instead
You must be a Super Admin to create private apps
Access tokens do not expire but can be rotated from the private app settings
Tokens start with 'pat-' followed by region code (e.g., pat-na1-, pat-eu1-)
Scope selection at creation determines which API endpoints the token can access
Free HubSpot accounts include private app access with limited API rate limits

test_endpoint.description: List owners (users) in the HubSpot account to verify the access token
